By default everyone is listed as ABSENT. Once confirmation of the attendance is received, their status will be
changed to PRESENT.
Following list only includes ticket holders (MPAs, MNAs) and Senators from Punjab and KPK provinces.
حلقہ نمبر Name - نام 7th April 14th April
